buildCommand: npx convex deploy --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL --cmd "npm run build"

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://clerk.zoomievan.ca https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://js.stripe.com https://*.js.stripe.com; connect-src 'self' https://clerk.zoomievan.ca https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://clerk-telemetry.com https://*.clerk-telemetry.com https://*.convex.cloud wss://*.convex.cloud https://api.stripe.com; img-src 'self' data: https://img.clerk.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://js.stripe.com https://*.js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com; form-action 'self' https://checkout.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
